docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAPST, JOSH $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN AUGUST 16, 2013 RETURN TO PLAINTIFF THE ENGLISH GOLDEN RETRIEVER, "WALLACE".
